name: rabbit-file
summary: Unified bug and backlog filing, tracking, and lifecycle. Stores items on origin/bug-backlog-files branch via Python scripts. Replaces (and retires) the legacy rabbit-bug and rabbit-backlog skills (no longer exist; rabbit-file is the sole entry point for bug/backlog operations).
deprecation_criterion: when a unified tracking system replaces file-based bug and backlog management
spec_no_change_reason: Plan E.rabbit-file spec change (Inv adding manifest/runtime/configuration meta-contract sections) committed by dispatcher before subagent invocation; subagent adds manifest/runtime/configuration sections + 2 e2e tests + atomic three-way version bump 0.4.0 -> 0.5.0.
